home.badge: Verified Scholarship Finder for Every Indian Student
home.title: Discover Verified Scholarships Tailored for Every Indian Student
home.subtitle: Connecting school and college students across India with government and trust scholarships through smart profile matching.
home.welcomeBackSubtitle: Continue exploring verified scholarships matched to your profile.
home.card1Desc: Direct links to Central Govt, State Govt, and verified private trust portals. Zero spam or scam schemes.
home.card2Desc: Matches your education level, income group, domicile state, and category automatically.
home.card3Desc: Check off income certificates, caste proofs, and marks cards before applying on official portals.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your matched scholarships and profile
auth.registerSubtitle: Join ScholarConnect to discover verified scholarships matched to your profile
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

scholarships.title: Explore Verified Scholarships in India
scholarships.subtitle: Direct government portals and verified private trust schemes for school, college, and postgraduate students.
scholarships.notice: Notice: Dates shown reflect typical annual cycles — always confirm exact current-year deadlines on the official portal before applying.
scholarships.uncertainNotice: These scholarships require additional profile details (e.g. state, category, or income) to confirm full eligibility.
scholarships.emptyEligibleDesc: Complete your profile or check back as we add more schemes.
scholarships.emptyUncertainDesc: Nothing here! Your profile is complete enough that we could confidently sort every scholarship into Eligible or Not Eligible.
scholarships.emptyAllDesc: Try resetting your dropdown selections or search term.
